items.title: Simon Carman's life before alleged murder of Thai teenager

children.content: Accused murderer Simon Peter Carman spent much of the past decade isolating himself from many of his friends and family in Australia. It's in his rented room in Thailand that local police allege a gruesome murder occurred.

items.title: Government rejects all UN recommendations on LGBTQIA+ rights

children.content: The Albanese government has accepted the lowest number of recommendations made by the UN Human Rights Council in 20 years, with none protecting the LGBTQIA+ community.

items.title: Socceroos legend criticises coach over penalty shootout goalkeeper substitute

children.content: Mark Schwarzer says he is not a fan of Tony Popovic's decision to swap goalkeepers ahead of the penalty shootout, even if it had been successful.

articles.title: 'I didn't know': Keeper sub gamble a failed shot in the dark

children.content: Tony Popovic made a bold call to swap out young keeper Pat Beach with veteran Mat Ryan for Australia's penalty shoot out defeat to Egypt. It didn't pay off.

image.altText: Patrick Beach gestures while goalkeeping

articles.title: Socceroos' World Cup ends in heartbreak, but path forward now clear

children.content: The Socceroos exited the World Cup in the cruellest possible manner, on penalties to Egypt. But the roots of the defeat could be found in the 120 minutes of play, which clearly showed where Australia must improve.
